metadata.name: orchard
metadata.description: Orchard 7 — The Gardens: GrienApple/BluApple dual-token gamified savings protocol

instructions.name: check_fountain_pulse
docs: Check if fountain has enough yield to fire a pulse.

accounts.name: fountain_vault
docs: The fountain SOL vault — we read its lamport balance

accounts.name: fountain_pulse
docs: The new pulse account (created if threshold crossed)

instructions.name: claim_fountain_reward
docs: Claim a reward from the active fountain pulse.

instructions.name: claim_rewards
docs: Claim GrienApple + accrue BluApple for one completed epoch.

instructions.name: crank_epoch
docs: Permissionless crank: advance epoch, mint GrienApple emissions, snapshot state.

instructions.name: crank_lp_epoch
docs: Permissionless crank: mint LP pool's 20% GrienApple emission.

accounts.name: epoch_state
docs: The just-cranked epoch state (read to get emission amount)

instructions.name: distribute_treasury
docs: Distribute SOL to treasury/fountain/buyback vaults per split.

instructions.name: fund_bank_treasury
docs: Fund the Bank's GrienApple treasury reserve.

instructions.name: harvest_blu
docs: Harvest ripened BluApple into GrienApple via gameplay action.

accounts.name: bank_grien_treasury
docs: PDA token account holding GrienApple treasury reserve for bank redemptions

instructions.name: initialize_fountain
docs: Initialize the Fountain with pulse threshold.

accounts.name: fountain_vault
docs: The fountain SOL vault from Treasury Splitter

instructions.name: initialize_garden
docs: Initialize the Garden: global state, GrienApple vault, epoch zero.
epoch_duration_secs: 86400 for production (24h), lower for testnet.

accounts.name: grien_mint
docs: GrienApple SPL mint (created off-chain, authority = mint_authority PDA)

accounts.name: garden_sol
docs: Program-owned PDA that holds raw SOL deposits

accounts.name: garden_grien_vault
docs: Token account to hold minted-but-unclaimed GrienApple

instructions.name: initialize_lp_garden
docs: Initialize the LP Garden with oracle price.

accounts.name: lp_vault
docs: PDA token account to hold deposited LP tokens

accounts.name: lp_grien_vault
docs: PDA token account to hold GrienApple for LP pool distribution

instructions.name: initialize_treasury
docs: Initialize the Treasury Splitter with 3 SOL vaults.

instructions.name: redeem_blu
docs: Redeem BluApple at the Bank for discounted GrienApple.

accounts.name: bank_grien_treasury
docs: Bank treasury GrienApple vault (source of discounted GrienApple)

instructions.name: stake_lp
docs: Stake LP tokens with lock tier (min 30 days).

accounts.name: lp_vault
docs: PDA vault holding deposited LP tokens

instructions.name: stake_sol
docs: Stake SOL into the LST Garden with an optional lock tier.

accounts.name: garden_sol
docs: Program-owned PDA that holds raw SOL deposits

instructions.name: unstake_lp
docs: Unstake LP tokens. Pass 0 for full withdrawal.

instructions.name: unstake_sol
docs: Unstake SOL from the LST Garden. Pass 0 for full withdrawal.

accounts.name: garden_sol
docs: Program-owned PDA that holds raw SOL deposits

instructions.name: update_treasury_config
docs: Update treasury split ratios (must sum to 10000).

instructions.name: view_ripened
docs: View total ripened (harvestable) BluApple for a user.

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: EpochNotFinalized
errors.msg: Cannot claim for an epoch not yet finalized

errors.name: InvalidMintAuthority
errors.msg: Mint authority does not match GrienApple mint

errors.name: CannotChangeLockTier
errors.msg: Cannot change lock tier while existing lock is active

errors.name: ActionNotLive
errors.msg: Action type not yet live (P1 only supports Garden Tending)

errors.name: ActionCapExceeded
errors.msg: BluApple amount exceeds action type cap

errors.name: LpLockActive
errors.msg: LP lock period has not expired

errors.name: InsufficientTreasuryReserve
errors.msg: Insufficient GrienApple reserve in bank treasury

errors.name: InvalidTreasurySplit
errors.msg: Treasury split shares must sum to 10000 basis points

errors.name: NoActivePulse
errors.msg: No active fountain pulse to claim

errors.name: NotStaking
errors.msg: Must be staking to claim fountain rewards

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer is not the garden authority

fields.name: grien_twap_price
docs: Admin-fed 7-day TWAP: lamports of SOL per 1 GrienApple (raw, 9 dec)

fields.name: daily_wallet_cap
docs: Max BluApple redeemable per wallet per day (raw, 9 dec)

fields.name: weekly_protocol_cap
docs: Max BluApple redeemable protocol-wide per week (raw, 9 dec)

fields.name: weekly_protocol_redeemed
docs: Running total BluApple redeemed this week protocol-wide

fields.name: current_week_start_ts
docs: Timestamp of start of current week for reset logic

fields.name: treasury_grien_vault
docs: PDA token account holding GrienApple treasury reserve

fields.name: last_reset_day
docs: Day number since genesis for daily reset

fields.name: week_redemption_count
docs: Number of redemptions this week (for escalating fees)

fields.name: current_week_number
docs: Week number since genesis for weekly reset

fields.name: earned_ts
docs: Timestamp of first earning in this batch

fields.name: total_amount
docs: Total BluApple earned in this batch (raw, 9 decimals)

fields.name: harvested_amount
docs: Amount harvested so far (P1 — starts at 0)

fields.name: head_idx
docs: Index of next write position in the ring buffer

fields.name: batches
docs: Weekly batch ring buffer (52 slots max)

fields.name: total_weighted_sol
docs: Snapshot of total_weighted_sol at epoch boundary

fields.name: grien_emitted
docs: GrienApple minted for LST pool this epoch (70% of daily emission)

fields.name: total_sol_deposited
docs: Snapshot of total_sol_deposited for BluApple calculation

types.name: FountainConfig
docs: The Fountain receives 30% of LST yield and converts it into game rewards.
When accumulated yield crosses the pulse threshold, a pulse fires and
eligible stakers can claim loot-table rewards.

fields.name: pulse_threshold
docs: Pulse trigger threshold in lamports (default: 0.25 SOL = 250_000_000)

fields.name: accumulated
docs: Total lamports accumulated since last pulse

fields.name: lifetime_accumulated
docs: Total lamports ever fed into the fountain

fields.name: fountain_vault
docs: Reference to the fountain SOL vault PDA (from Treasury Splitter)

fields.name: active_pulse_id
docs: Current active pulse ID (0 = no active pulse, >0 = pulse in progress)

types.name: FountainPulse
docs: Record of a single fountain pulse. Created when threshold is crossed.
Stakers can claim rewards from this pulse within its claim window.

fields.name: trigger_amount
docs: SOL amount that triggered this pulse

fields.name: claims_count
docs: Number of reward claims made from this pulse

fields.name: total_weighted_sol
docs: Total weighted SOL at time of pulse (snapshot for eligibility)

fields.name: total_sol_deposited
docs: Total raw SOL lamports deposited across all stakers

fields.name: total_weighted_sol
docs: Sum of all weighted stakes (u128 to avoid overflow with large pools)

fields.name: epoch_duration_secs
docs: Epoch duration in seconds (86400 for production, lower for testnet)

types.name: HarvestConfig
docs: Global configuration for the Harvest/Conversion Gate (Module 7+8)

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority who can update config (must match garden.authority)

fields.name: global_today_converted
docs: Running total of BluApple converted globally today

fields.name: current_day_start_ts
docs: Timestamp of start of current "day" for reset logic

types.name: HarvestTracker
docs: Per-user tracking for daily harvest conversions (Module 7)

fields.name: last_reset_day
docs: Day number since genesis when tracker was last reset

fields.name: lifetime_converted
docs: Lifetime total BluApple harvested via gameplay

fields.name: lp_vault
docs: PDA token account holding deposited LP tokens

fields.name: total_weighted_lp
docs: Sum of all weighted LP (for GrienApple distribution)

fields.name: sol_price_per_lp
docs: Admin-fed: lamports of SOL equivalent per 1 LP token (for BluApple calc)

fields.name: total_lp_grien_minted
docs: Total GrienApple minted for LP pool (separate tracking for cap enforcement)

fields.name: owner
docs: Wallet that owns this LP stake

fields.name: next_claim_epoch
docs: Next epoch to claim rewards for (synced with main garden epochs)

types.name: SolVault
docs: Minimal account to make the SOL vault PDA program-owned.
Holds lamports for stakers' deposited SOL.

fields.name: lock_expiry
docs: Unix timestamp when lock expires (0 if no lock)

fields.name: next_claim_epoch
docs: Next epoch to claim rewards for

types.name: TreasurySplitVault
docs: Minimal PDA marker account for treasury split vaults.
Same pattern as SolVault from P0.
